mechanism_narrative: A falling FEDFUNDS rate lowers the discount rate on equity cash flows and eases financial conditions, so sustained declines in policy rates predict positive S&P 500 returns over the next month. The signal fails when rate cuts are already fully anticipated and equity prices have not repriced.
failure_condition: Rejected if 20-day forward SPX returns are not positive in at least 55% of months with a negative 3-month change in FEDFUNDS, or if the rolling 3-year Rank IC stays below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE above its recent trend identifies deteriorating labor demand and income risk, which depresses cyclical earnings expectations and leads to negative S&P 500 returns over the next month. The effect should strengthen when unemployment is rising faster than payroll growth is slowing.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Rejected if triggered episodes produce positive 20-day SPX returns more than 60% of the time, or if UNRATE increases are not followed by weaker returns after controlling for PAYEMS growth.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly acceleration in RSAFS indicates stronger consumer spending and revenue momentum, which lifts near-term earnings revisions and supports positive S&P 500 returns over the next week. The signal fails when sales gains come only from inflation rather than real demand.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS rises above its 3-month moving average
failure_condition: Rejected if weeks with RSAFS above its 3-month average do not show positive 5-day SPX returns more often than not, or if the effect disappears when CPIAUCSL inflation is flat.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in INDPRO reflects strengthening industrial activity and capacity utilization, which improves cyclical earnings expectations and predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter. The mechanism fails if industrial output rises while financial conditions are tightening sharply.
failure_condition: Rejected if rolling 60-day forward SPX returns are not higher following positive 3-month changes in INDPRO, or if the rolling 3-year Rank IC falls below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A drop in HOUST below a depressed threshold signals weak construction demand and softer future activity, which should weigh on equity returns over the next quarter. The signal is strongest when housing weakness is not offset by improving labor data.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls below its 6-month average by at least 5%
failure_condition: Rejected if triggered housing downturns are followed by positive 60-day SPX returns more than 55% of the time, or if the signal vanishes once UNRATE is held constant.

mechanism_narrative: High CPIAUCSL inflation with still-low FEDFUNDS implies negative real policy rates and easier-than-needed financial conditions, which can support risk assets over the next month until the market prices policy normalization. The signal fails if inflation surprises are already forcing immediate repricing of growth expectations.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL is rising while FEDFUNDS remains below 1%
regime_hint: early inflation scare with accommodative policy
failure_condition: Rejected if episodes with rising CPIAUCSL and FEDFUNDS below 1% do not produce above-baseline 20-day SPX returns, or if returns turn persistently negative after the trigger.

mechanism_narrative: A rising PAYEMS series confirms expanding payroll employment and stronger household income, which supports equity valuations and predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next week. The signal is weaker when payroll gains are not matched by falling unemployment.
failure_condition: Rejected if two-month payroll expansion episodes fail to generate positive 5-day SPX returns more often than baseline, or if the effect disappears when UNRATE is rising.

mechanism_narrative: A positive gap between GDPC1 growth and weak labor-market readings signals output resilience with limited wage pressure, which should lift risk appetite and produce positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter. The mechanism fails when GDP strength is accompanied by accelerating inflation or policy tightening.
failure_condition: Rejected if positive 60-day SPX returns do not follow periods of stable or improving GDPC1 with non-rising UNRATE, or if the relation disappears during FEDFUNDS tightening phases.
